title: Final Papers and Calendar
description: Prepare the final submission forms, including the Note of Issue and Request for Judicial Intervention, before judgment.
tips: Complete all sworn statements and affirmations required for an uncontested divorce.
File the Note of Issue when your case is ready for the court's review.
Request judicial intervention when your county requires it for the next conference or review.
warnings: Incomplete final papers are a common reason for court rejection.
